title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Says It Targeted Hezbollah After New Cease-Fire With Lebanon
summary_full: The U.S.-brokered talks to clinch the deal did not include Hezbollah, the Iranian-backed armed group, which said it had fired rockets at Israeli targets hours after the truce was announced.
summary_public: The U.S.-brokered talks to clinch the deal did not include Hezbollah, the Iranian-backed armed group, which said it had fired rockets at Israeli targets hours after the truce was announced.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel Says It Targeted Hezbollah After New Cease-Fire
